items.title: Cuba suspends annual cigar festival as U.S. oil blockade deepens energy crisis
items.description: The postponement comes as the island nation's communist-run government endures its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union.

items.title: U.S. and European interests are 'intertwined,' Secretary of State Rubio says
items.description: Speaking at the Munich Security Conference, the U.S. secretary of State stressed the importance of cooperation with Europe.

items.title: Epstein files fallout: The high-profile people burned by past dealings with a predator
items.description: Jeffrey Epstein killed himself in a New York City federal jail in 2019. But more than six years later, people are still losing their jobs because of h...

items.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
items.description: Congress is on recess until Feb. 23, and both Democrats and Republicans appear dug into their positions.

items.title: Trump trade adviser Navarro says administration may force data center builders like Meta to 'internalize' costs
items.description: Data centers powering artificial intelligence have strained the electrical grid and driven utility costs higher for consumers.
